title: Aurora Tent — Indigo
summary: Aurora tent in indigo; built in Italy for daily use.

content.text:
# Aurora Tent — Indigo

Built for daily wear and refinishing. The Aurora Tent — Indigo is designed for the long haul, with outdoor-grade materials and a quiet, considered fit and finish.

## Highlights

- Crafted in Italy.
- Repairable construction with serviceable parts.
- Backed by a one-year materials warranty.

## Care

Condition every 60 days for best results. Spot-clean only; avoid harsh detergents. Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight.
{"weight_g":1279,"materials":{"upper":"full-grain leather","sole":"oak-tanned leather","lining":"vegetable-tanned calfskin"},"care":"wipe with a damp cloth","made_in":"Italy","capacity":"4-person"}
